results.question: steps for the moore weekend archive
results.description: Process lookup — returns automated 21r2 PROD Archive article
results.answer_preview: Source: Kb Docs  Automated 21R2 Weekend Restart  Every Sunday, we initiate a restart of the Moore CRD servers for three environments: QA, UAT, and PROD. results.answer_preview: Source: Kb Docs  TIDAL > Operator Release  Operator Release:  it means that the job will not run automatically, even if all its scheduling conditions and dependencies are met.
